title: Administration services access should be restricted to specific IP addresses
description: Enforces that administration services should only be accessible from specific IP addresses.
message: Publicly accessible administration services are a potential security risk.
recommendation: Limit access to administration services to specific IP addresses.
why_is_this_an_issue: Publicly accessible administration services are a potential security risk as they can be exploited by attackers.
how_to_fix: Limit access to administration services to specific IP addresses.
